description: Style Note catwalk takes the street sandal trend a notch higher with this pair. Wear this lovely versatile pair with harem pants, denims or leggings and look perfect. This pair is designed to Fit your foot snugly without making it seem bulky. Grab them before its too late! Product Details Brown sandal with a toe holder and a midfoot strap (half made of coloured elasticated fabric) A buckle detail on the strap connecting the toe holder and midfoot strap A padded and curved footbed TPU outsole with upraised heel and branded grooves Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
